description: Papers from 2020-2026 on Thompson Sampling and Bayesian methods applied to health interventions, digital health, and clinical trials.

papers.label: Bayesian-Bandit Design for N-of-1 Trials
papers.authors: Shrestha S, Jain S
papers.headline: First TS application to N-of-1 trials with hierarchical Bayesian borrowing
papers.detail: TS-based adaptive design for N-of-1 trials. Hierarchical model jointly estimates individual/population effects via MCMC.

papers.label: Accelerated TS for Response-Adaptive Trials
papers.authors: Wang J
papers.headline: NEGATIVE: TS disappointing in clinical trials; acceleration proposed
papers.detail: Reports multiple simulations show TS fails in clinical trial settings. Proposes accelerated TS for short-run improvement.

papers.label: Top-Two TS for Best Treatment ID
papers.authors: Wang J, Tiwari R
papers.headline: TTTS with acceleration for small-sample drug development
papers.detail: Extends TTTS to drug development small-sample regime. Introduces simpler TTTS2 variant.

papers.label: TS for SMART Designs
papers.authors: Norwood P, Davidian M, Laber E
papers.headline: First TS-based RAR for multi-stage SMARTs
papers.detail: First RAR algorithms for SMARTs using TS. Valid post-study inference for non-standard limiting behavior.

papers.label: Finite-Sample Error for RAR
papers.authors: Deliu N, Villar SS
papers.headline: When TS-based inference fails: finite-sample analysis
papers.detail: Error control of randomization tests under TS-based RAR. Conditions where standard inference fails identified.

papers.label: MABs for Dose-Finding
papers.authors: Kojima M
papers.headline: TS vs UCB vs Gittins for dose-finding trials
papers.detail: Systematic MAB evaluation including TS for dose-finding. TS balances patient benefit and correct ID.

papers.label: Contextual Bandits for Dose Selection
papers.authors: Wang J, Tiwari R
papers.headline: Contextual TS for personalized dose in Phase I/II
papers.detail: Extends TS to handle covariates for personalized dose selection in early-phase trials.

papers.label: Practical Online Learning for mHealth
papers.authors: Gonzalez RT, Abbott MR, Nallamothu B, et al.
papers.headline: Practical TS deployment guide for mHealth apps
papers.detail: Cold-start, delayed feedback, non-stationarity, exploration-exploitation in mHealth TS deployment.

papers.label: Replicable Bandits for Digital Health
papers.authors: Zhang KW, Closser A, Trella AL, Murphy SA
papers.headline: TS variants ensuring valid post-study inference
papers.detail: Replicable bandits including TS variants guaranteeing error control for treatment effect estimation.

papers.label: Causal Inference and Bandits for Digital Health
papers.authors: Svihrova R, Dei Rossi A, Marzorati D, et al.
papers.headline: Review: TS open problems in digital health
papers.detail: Reviews TS variants, exploration, causal inference. Open problems: non-stationarity, heterogeneity.

papers.label: TS for TB Screening in Peru
papers.authors: Zhang J, Linde L, Puma D, et al.
papers.headline: Deployed TS for mobile TB screening in Lima
papers.detail: TS-based bandit optimizes mobile TB screening locations. Increases case detection efficiency.

papers.label: Bayesian RAR for Cluster RCTs
papers.authors: Liu Y, Young Karris M, Jain S
papers.headline: TS-based RAR extended to cluster-randomized trials
papers.detail: Extends Bayesian RAR with TS to CRCTs addressing intra-cluster correlation.

papers.label: TS for Non-Stationary Bandits
papers.authors: Qi H, Guo F, Zhu L
papers.headline: TS with change-point detection for non-stationarity
papers.detail: TS with change-point detection and sliding-window posteriors. Provides regret bounds.

papers.label: Bandits for COVID-19 Case-Finding
papers.authors: Rayo MF, Faulkner D, Kline D, et al.
papers.headline: TS deployed for COVID-19 testing in Ohio
papers.detail: TS bandits for adaptive testing site allocation. Improves over heuristic methods.

papers.label: Bandits with Volume Constraints
papers.authors: Warren JL, Prunas O, Paltiel AD, et al.
papers.venue: Journal of the Royal Statistical Society: Series A
papers.headline: TS with resource constraints for surveillance
papers.detail: Integrates testing volume constraints into TS bandits for disease surveillance.

papers.label: Bayesian Optimization for TMS
papers.authors: Schultheiss DL, Turi Z, Boedecker J, Vlachos A
papers.headline: Bayesian optimization reduces TMS patient burden
papers.detail: GP-based Bayesian optimization for TMS coil positioning; fewer stimulations than grid search.

papers.label: Bayesian m-Top for Vaccine Policy
papers.authors: Cimpean A, Verstraeten T, Willem L, et al.
papers.headline: Bayesian exploration for COVID-19 vaccine policy
papers.detail: Bayesian m-top exploration (TS-related) for vaccine allocation policy evaluation.

papers.label: Optimal Allocation in Adaptive Designs
papers.authors: Yi Y, Wang X
papers.headline: Theoretical: TS vs optimal allocation targets
papers.detail: Compares TS-based allocation to optimal Neyman allocation.

papers.label: Bayesian Strategy for GP Prescribing
papers.authors: Allender S, Hayward J, Gupta S, et al.
papers.headline: Bayesian optimization for healthcare strategy
papers.detail: GP-based Bayesian optimization identifies optimal healthcare strategies.

papers.label: MAB Backfill BOIN
papers.authors: Kojima M, Takeda K
papers.headline: TS-MAB with Bayesian optimal interval design
papers.detail: Integrates TS-based MAB with BOIN for dose-finding with backfill.

papers.label: Mixed-Effects Bandit for mHealth
papers.authors: Huch EK, Shi J, Abbott MR, et al.
papers.headline: Mixed-effects TS for user heterogeneity in mHealth
papers.detail: Robust mixed-effects TS accounting for between-user heterogeneity in mobile health.

papers.label: Bayesian RAR with Binary Outcomes
papers.authors: Proper J, Connett J, Murray T
papers.headline: Comparison of Bayesian RAR including TS-like allocation
papers.detail: Evaluates Bayesian RAR techniques for binary outcomes, comparing TS-like posterior probability allocation against alternatives.

papers.label: Contextual-Bandit for Clinical Trials
papers.authors: Varatharajah Y, Berry B
papers.headline: Contextual bandit with Bayesian TS for trial decision-making
papers.detail: Contextual bandit using Bayesian posterior sampling for treatment allocation conditional on covariates.
